title: 1 Lyft Services
subtitle: Starting a Lyft Transportation Program
description:
A transportation assistance strategy that helps Latino MSM access PrEP and mental health/substance use serices by providing reliable, confidential, and low-burden transportation to and from appointments.

This page provides an overview + downloadable SOPs to help your team launch this program.

fast_facts.outcome: Improve patient attendance and engagement in PrEP & MH/SU services.

when_to_use: Use this strategy if you are...
